name: MVRV Z-Score
reason: Redundant with V019 (MVRV/SOPR already in registry). Same underlying metric, different scaling. No independent information.

name: Funding rate arbitrage (delta-neutral)
reason: Uncorrelated with directional strategies by construction — not a directional signal. Wrong scale for BNMA (arb returns, not long-short Sharpe).

name: Pairs trading BTC-ETH cointegration
reason: Relative-value strategy, not directional signal. Sharpe 2.45 at 5-min frequency = microstructure alpha, not tradeable at Gerald's horizon. Wrong scale.

name: Dual momentum / Antonacci GEM
reason: Portfolio construction strategy, not a variable. Composite of TSMOM + cross-sectional momentum already captured by V009/V026.

name: HRP (Hierarchical Risk Parity)
reason: Portfolio construction method, not a signal variable. Not rankable on long-short Sharpe scale.

name: EIA inventory surprises (crude)
reason: Event-study scale, same exclusion rationale as V020/V033 (Catalyst category). Would need separate event-study BNMA.

name: OPEC+ production decisions
reason: Event-study / catalyst. Same exclusion as EIA. Not on long-short Sharpe scale.

name: Geopolitical Risk Index (Caldara-Iacoviello)
reason: Candidate pool cap reached (12 admitted). Borderline — interesting but effect size primarily through VIX channel (overlap with V001). Could re-evaluate at next quarterly.
